name: SIR Royalty Income Fund
summary: SIR Royalty Income Fund, through SIR Royalty Limited Partnership, owns service inspired restaurants in Canada. The company operates concept restaurant brands under the Jack Astor's Bar and Grill, Scaddabush Italian Kitchen & Bar, and Canyon Creek Chop House; and signature restaurant brands under the Reds Wine Tavern, Reds Midtown Tavern, Reds Square One, and The Loose Moose Tap & Grill brands. It also owns and operates two Duke's Refresher & Bar in downtown Toronto; and a seasonal restaurant under the Abbey's Bakehouse name in Muskoka, Ontario, as well as an Abbey's Bakehouse retail outlet. As of December 31, 2020, it owned 59 concept restaurants and signature restaurants. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Burlington, Canada.
